🚨 Problem Statement

🏥

No Triage Mechanism

Rural and remote healthcare centers treat all patients with the same priority, regardless of how severe their condition is.

⏱️

Dangerous Delays

Critical cases — strokes, trauma, severe infections — are not identified promptly, leading to avoidable deterioration.

🧠

Need for Intelligence

There is no system to analyze symptoms at intake and classify urgency without requiring expert intervention on-site.

💡 Our Solution

Sanjeevani is an AI-powered, fully automated tele-health triage platform that collects patient data, classifies cases as Critical, Urgent, or Routine, and automatically triggers the right workflow — without needing a doctor present at intake.

📋

Automated Intake

Patients fill a structured form via UiPath Apps — capturing name, age, symptoms, severity, and location.

🤖

AI Classification

An LLM/RAG-powered agent analyzes the symptom profile and assigns a triage severity level instantly.

⚡

Instant Escalation

Critical and urgent cases trigger automated Maestro workflows — notifying doctors via email with full case details.

📊

Doctor Dashboard

Physicians can review patient data, accept/reject cases, contact patients, and mark cases as resolved.

🔄 Methodology Pipeline

1

Patient Data Collection — UiPath Apps

Patients register via a UiPath App form, submitting demographics, symptoms, duration, self-reported severity, medications, and location.

2

Data Processing & Triage Decision — LLM/RAG Agent

The AI agent processes the structured data and applies clinical triage logic to classify urgency as Critical, Urgent, or Routine.

3

Decision Execution — UiPath Maestro Workflow

Based on triage output, Maestro orchestrates the next steps: updating Google Sheets, triggering notifications, and routing to the doctor panel.

4

Output & Monitoring — Email + Dashboard

Doctors receive structured email alerts with complete case details and can manage cases through the Patient Case Management interface.

🛠️ Tech Stack

UiPath Apps
UiPath Maestro
UiPath Agents
UiPath Studio Web
Google Sheets
LLM / RAG

🏁 Conclusion

"Right care, at the right time, for the right patient."

Sanjeevani leverages UiPath's full automation ecosystem to intelligently classify patients by urgency, streamline healthcare workflows, and ensure critical cases receive immediate attention — all while optimizing resource utilization. This solution directly improves accessibility, reduces dangerous delays, and transforms rural healthcare delivery.

✅

Accessibility

Patients in remote areas can submit cases digitally without traveling to a facility first.

⚡

Speed

AI triage happens in under 2 seconds per patient, dramatically cutting response times for critical cases.

📈

Scalability

The UiPath Maestro workflow can handle hundreds of concurrent cases and scale to any healthcare network.
